cards.meaning_en: Moisturizer — cream that hydrates the skin
cards.example_en: Applying moisturizer every morning makes skin dewy.

cards.meaning_ko: 세안 후 피부결을 정돈하는 스킨케어 제품
cards.meaning_en: Toner — applied after cleansing to balance skin
cards.example_ko: 세안 후 토너로 피부 결을 정돈해요.
cards.example_en: I tone my skin after cleansing.

cards.meaning_ko: 피부에 영양을 주는 가벼운 액체 제품
cards.meaning_en: Essence — lightweight liquid that nourishes skin
cards.example_en: Essence makes skin plump and elastic.

cards.meaning_ko: 고농축 성분이 들어간 피부 개선 제품
cards.meaning_en: Serum — highly concentrated skin treatment
cards.example_en: I use vitamin C serum every day.

cards.meaning_en: Cleanser — removes dirt and makeup from skin
cards.example_ko: 저녁에는 이중 세안을 해요: 클렌징 오일 후 클렌저.
cards.example_en: In the evening I double cleanse: oil then cleanser.

cards.meaning_en: Sunscreen — protects skin from UV rays
cards.example_ko: 외출 전에 꼭 선크림을 발라야 해요.
cards.example_en: Always apply sunscreen before going out.

cards.meaning_ko: 에센스가 가득 담긴 얇은 천을 얼굴에 붙이는 마스크
cards.meaning_en: Sheet mask — fabric mask soaked in essence
cards.example_ko: 일주일에 두 번 시트 마스크를 해요.
cards.example_en: I do a sheet mask twice a week.

cards.meaning_en: Eye cream — targeted cream for the eye area
cards.example_en: Eye cream helps reduce dark circles.

cards.meaning_en: Exfoliation — removing dead skin cells
cards.example_ko: 일주일에 한 번 각질 제거를 하면 피부가 밝아져요.
cards.example_en: Weekly exfoliation brightens the skin.

cards.meaning_ko: 세럼보다 더 농축된 고기능 스킨케어 제품
cards.meaning_en: Ampoule — more concentrated than serum
cards.example_en: Use ampoules for specific skin concerns.

cards.meaning_ko: 자는 동안 피부를 집중 케어하는 마스크
cards.meaning_en: Sleeping pack — overnight mask for intensive care
cards.example_en: On dry days, finish with a sleeping pack.

cards.meaning_ko: 피부에 수분을 보충하기 위해 뿌리는 제품
cards.meaning_en: Mist — spray to refresh and hydrate skin
cards.example_ko: 메이크업 위에 미스트를 뿌리면 촉촉해 보여요.
cards.example_en: Spritzing mist over makeup looks dewy.

cards.meaning_ko: 피부 톤을 균일하게 만들어주는 베이스 메이크업
cards.meaning_en: Foundation — base makeup that evens skin tone
cards.example_en: Choose a foundation that suits your skin type.

cards.meaning_ko: 입술에 색을 주는 스틱 형태의 제품
cards.meaning_en: Lipstick — stick product that adds color to lips
cards.example_en: Red lipstick is always popular.

cards.meaning_en: Blush — adds color and vitality to cheeks
cards.example_en: Blush makes your face look radiant.

cards.meaning_en: Eyeshadow — color applied to the eyelids
cards.example_en: Brown-toned eyeshadow looks natural.

cards.meaning_en: Cushion compact — foundation in a sponge puff
cards.example_ko: K-뷰티 쿠션은 전 세계에서 인기가 많아요.
cards.example_en: K-beauty cushion compacts are popular worldwide.

cards.meaning_ko: 피부 보정과 자외선 차단을 동시에 하는 크림
cards.meaning_en: BB cream — tinted moisturizer with SPF
cards.example_en: BB cream lets you do quick, simple makeup.

cards.meaning_ko: 속눈썹을 길고 풍성하게 보이게 하는 제품
cards.meaning_en: Mascara — makes lashes look longer and fuller
cards.example_ko: 워터프루프 마스카라는 땀에도 잘 지워지지 않아요.
cards.example_en: Waterproof mascara won't smudge with sweat.

cards.meaning_ko: 눈을 또렷하게 강조하기 위해 눈가에 그리는 제품
cards.meaning_en: Eyeliner — defines and emphasizes the eyes
cards.example_ko: 눈꼬리에 아이라이너를 그리면 눈이 커 보여요.
cards.example_en: Drawing eyeliner at the outer corner makes eyes look bigger.

cards.meaning_ko: 얼굴 윤곽을 또렷하게 만드는 메이크업 기법
cards.meaning_en: Contour — makeup technique to define face shape
cards.example_en: Contouring makes the face look slimmer.

cards.meaning_en: Highlighter — adds a luminous glow to skin
cards.example_ko: 콧등에 하이라이터를 살짝 바르면 빛나 보여요.
cards.example_en: A touch of highlighter on the nose bridge looks radiant.

cards.meaning_en: Setting spray — keeps makeup in place longer
cards.example_ko: 세팅 스프레이를 마지막에 뿌려 메이크업을 고정해요.
cards.example_en: Finish with setting spray to lock in your makeup.

cards.meaning_en: Lip tint — stains lips with color, long-lasting
cards.example_ko: K-뷰티 립 틴트는 오래 가고 색이 자연스러워요.
cards.example_en: K-beauty lip tints last long and look natural.

cards.meaning_ko: 피부의 수분을 붙잡아주는 강력한 보습 성분
cards.meaning_en: Hyaluronic acid — powerful humectant that retains moisture
cards.example_ko: 히알루론산은 피부 수분을 오래 유지시켜 줘요.
cards.example_en: Hyaluronic acid keeps skin hydrated longer.

cards.meaning_ko: 피부 톤을 밝게 하고 모공을 줄이는 비타민 B3 성분
cards.meaning_en: Niacinamide — vitamin B3 that brightens and minimizes pores
cards.example_en: I reduced blemishes with niacinamide serum.

cards.meaning_ko: 주름을 줄이고 피부 재생을 돕는 비타민 A 성분
cards.meaning_en: Retinol — vitamin A that reduces wrinkles and boosts cell renewal
cards.example_en: Start with a small amount of retinol at first.

cards.meaning_ko: 피부 진정과 회복을 돕는 식물 성분
cards.meaning_en: Centella asiatica — plant extract that soothes & heals skin
cards.example_ko: 자극받은 피부에 센텔라 크림이 도움이 돼요.
cards.example_en: Centella cream helps irritated skin.

cards.meaning_ko: 달팽이 분비물로 피부 재생과 보습에 효과적인 성분
cards.meaning_en: Snail mucin — snail secretion for skin repair and hydration
cards.example_en: Snail cream is an iconic K-beauty ingredient.

cards.meaning_en: Propolis — bee-derived antibacterial antioxidant
cards.example_en: Propolis ampoule is great for acne-prone skin.

cards.meaning_ko: 피부를 밝게 하고 항산화 효과가 있는 성분
cards.meaning_en: Vitamin C — brightens skin and provides antioxidant protection
cards.example_ko: 비타민 C 세럼을 아침에 바르면 피부가 맑아져요.
cards.example_en: Apply vitamin C serum in the morning for clear skin.

cards.meaning_en: AHA — alpha hydroxy acid that gently removes dead skin
cards.example_en: I use an AHA toner to manage dead skin.

cards.meaning_en: Ceramide — lipid that strengthens the skin barrier
cards.example_en: Ceramide cream calms sensitive skin.

cards.meaning_ko: 피부 탄력과 재생을 돕는 단백질 성분
cards.meaning_en: Peptide — protein-based ingredient that boosts elasticity
cards.example_en: Peptide cream is effective for anti-aging.

cards.meaning_ko: 항균 효과가 있는 식물 추출 성분
cards.meaning_en: Tea tree — antibacterial plant extract for blemishes
cards.example_en: Tea tree oil is effective for acne.

cards.meaning_ko: 항산화 효과가 있는 녹차에서 추출한 성분
cards.meaning_en: Green tea extract — antioxidant-rich botanical
cards.example_ko: 녹차 추출물은 피부를 진정시키는 데 도움이 돼요.
cards.example_en: Green tea extract helps calm the skin.

decks.name: 쇼핑표현
decks.description: Useful expressions for shopping at Olive Young

cards.meaning_en: Skin type — classification of one's skin
cards.example_ko: 제 피부 타입에 맞는 제품을 추천해 주세요.
cards.example_en: Please recommend a product for my skin type.

cards.meaning_ko: 구매 전 체험해볼 수 있는 소량의 제품
cards.meaning_en: Sample — small product to try before buying
cards.example_en: Can I get a sample?

cards.meaning_en: Discount — reduction in price
cards.example_en: Are there any products on discount now?

cards.meaning_ko: 상품이 다 팔려서 더 이상 없는 상태
cards.meaning_en: Sold out — product is no longer in stock
cards.example_en: This product is sold out.

cards.meaning_en: Best seller — most popular product
cards.example_en: What is the Olive Young best seller?

cards.meaning_en: Recommendation — suggesting something good
cards.example_ko: 좋은 제품 추천해 주실 수 있어요?
cards.example_en: Could you give me a recommendation?

cards.meaning_en: New arrival — newly released product
cards.example_en: Do you have any new arrivals?

cards.meaning_en: Membership — loyalty program for a store or brand
cards.example_en: Do you have a membership card?

cards.meaning_ko: 직접 써볼 수 있도록 비치된 제품
cards.meaning_en: Tester — display product available to try
cards.example_en: May I try the tester?

cards.meaning_ko: 산 물건을 돌려주고 돈을 돌려받는 것
cards.meaning_en: Refund — returning a product for money back
cards.example_en: Is a refund possible for this product?

cards.meaning_ko: 일정 기간 또는 수량만 판매하는 특별 제품
cards.meaning_en: Limited edition — special product sold for a limited time or quantity
cards.example_en: This is limited edition so you should buy it quickly.

cards.meaning_en: Gift with purchase — free item given when buying
cards.example_en: Is there a free gift with this product?

cards.meaning_en: Skin barrier — protective layer that guards skin from damage
cards.example_en: When the skin barrier is weak, skin becomes sensitive.

cards.meaning_ko: 스킨케어 제품을 순서대로 겹겹이 바르는 방법
cards.meaning_en: Layering — applying skincare products in sequence
cards.example_en: The key to K-beauty is product layering.

cards.meaning_ko: 오일로 먼저 씻고 폼 클렌저로 한 번 더 씻는 방법
cards.meaning_en: Double cleansing — oil first, then foam cleanser
cards.example_en: Double cleansing fully removes makeup.

cards.meaning_en: Glass skin — clear, translucent, luminous skin
cards.example_en: Glass skin is the K-beauty ideal.

cards.meaning_ko: 여드름, 뾰루지 등 피부 문제를 통틀어 이르는 말
cards.meaning_en: Trouble — general term for skin issues like acne
cards.example_en: I get skin trouble when I'm stressed.

cards.meaning_ko: 수분이 많아 촉촉하고 생기 있는 피부 상태
cards.meaning_en: Dewy — moist, glowing, hydrated skin texture
cards.example_en: Dewy skin is a hallmark of K-beauty makeup.

cards.meaning_en: Pore — small opening in the skin surface
cards.example_en: There are many products for minimizing pores.

cards.meaning_ko: 피부 톤을 밝고 고르게 하는 것
cards.meaning_en: Brightening / whitening — evening and illuminating skin tone
cards.example_en: My skin tone brightened with whitening serum.

cards.meaning_en: Anti-aging — preventing or slowing skin aging
cards.example_en: It's good to start anti-aging care in your 30s.

cards.meaning_ko: 자극에 쉽게 반응하는 예민한 피부 타입
cards.meaning_en: Sensitive skin — skin that reacts easily to irritants
cards.example_ko: 민감성 피부에는 향이 없는 제품이 좋아요.
cards.example_en: Fragrance-free products are good for sensitive skin.

cards.meaning_ko: 피지가 많이 분비되어 번들거리는 피부 타입
cards.meaning_en: Oily skin — skin that produces excess sebum
cards.example_ko: 지성 피부에는 가벼운 젤 타입이 좋아요.
cards.example_en: Light gel textures work well for oily skin.

cards.meaning_ko: 수분이 부족하여 건조하고 당기는 피부 타입
cards.meaning_en: Dry skin — skin lacking moisture, often tight and flaky
cards.example_ko: 건성 피부는 수분크림을 꼭 발라야 해요.
cards.example_en: Dry skin needs moisturizer without fail.

decks.name: 브랜드
decks.description: Major K-beauty brands (meaning fields describe each brand, not a word)

cards.meaning_ko: 제주 자연 원료를 쓰는 자연주의 중저가 브랜드
cards.meaning_en: Innisfree — nature-focused, affordable brand using Jeju ingredients
cards.example_en: Where can I find the Innisfree green tea serum?

cards.meaning_ko: 수분 케어와 슬리핑 마스크로 유명한 브랜드
cards.meaning_en: Laneige — known for hydration care and sleeping masks
cards.example_en: Do you have the Laneige lip sleeping mask?

cards.meaning_en: Sulwhasoo — premium brand using traditional herbal ingredients
cards.example_en: Sulwhasoo is popular as a gift.

cards.meaning_en: Dr.Jart+ — dermatological brand famous for Cicapair
cards.example_en: Please recommend the Dr.Jart+ cica cream.

cards.meaning_ko: 성분 중심으로 글로벌 인기가 높은 브랜드
cards.meaning_en: COSRX — ingredient-focused brand with global popularity
cards.example_en: I'm looking for the COSRX snail essence.

cards.meaning_en: Mediheal — brand famous for sheet masks
cards.example_ko: 메디힐 마스크팩 세트로 살 수 있어요?
cards.example_en: Can I buy the Mediheal masks as a set?

cards.meaning_en: Anua — brand that rose to fame with its houttuynia toner
cards.example_en: Is the Anua houttuynia toner in stock?

cards.meaning_en: Round Lab — gentle brand known for its Dokdo toner
cards.example_en: Where is the Round Lab Dokdo toner?

cards.meaning_en: Beauty of Joseon — global hit known for its sunscreen
cards.example_en: I'll take two Beauty of Joseon sunscreens.

cards.meaning_en: Clio — brand known for makeup like eyeliner and cushions
cards.example_en: Do you have more colors of the Clio eyeliner?

cards.meaning_en: rom&nd — color makeup brand popular for its lip tints
cards.example_en: What's the best-selling rom&nd tint shade?

cards.meaning_en: Etude — playful color makeup brand aimed at younger shoppers
cards.example_en: What floor is the Etude store on?

decks.name: 성분 2
decks.description: Trending K-beauty actives beyond the basics

cards.meaning_ko: 연어 DNA에서 얻는 피부 재생·탄력 성분
cards.meaning_en: PDRN — salmon-DNA ingredient that aids skin repair and elasticity
cards.example_en: I heard PDRN ampoules are trending—do you have any?

cards.meaning_en: Collagen — protein that supports skin firmness
cards.example_en: Does collagen cream help with firmness?

cards.meaning_ko: 피부를 진정시키고 보습하는 비타민 B5 성분
cards.meaning_en: Panthenol — vitamin B5 that soothes and hydrates skin
cards.example_en: Do you have a soothing product with panthenol?

cards.meaning_en: Madecassoside — soothing, healing compound from centella
cards.example_en: Madecassoside cream is good for irritated skin.

cards.meaning_ko: 모공 속 피지와 각질을 녹이는 BHA 성분
cards.meaning_en: Salicylic acid — BHA that clears sebum and buildup in pores
cards.example_ko: 살리실산 들어간 제품은 트러블 피부에 좋아요.
cards.example_en: Products with salicylic acid are good for acne-prone skin.

cards.meaning_en: Adenosine — anti-aging ingredient for improving wrinkles
cards.example_en: Adenosine is effective for reducing wrinkles.

cards.meaning_ko: 진정 효과가 뛰어난 식물 추출 성분
cards.meaning_en: Houttuynia extract — botanical with strong soothing benefits
cards.example_en: Houttuynia toner is popular for sensitive skin.

cards.meaning_en: Arbutin — brightening ingredient that fades pigmentation
cards.example_en: Arbutin serum is good for managing dark spots.

cards.meaning_en: Tranexamic acid — brightening agent for melasma and pigmentation
cards.example_en: Do you have a brightening product with tranexamic acid?

cards.meaning_ko: 피부 톤을 맑게 하는 항산화 성분
cards.meaning_en: Glutathione — antioxidant that brightens overall skin tone
cards.example_en: Glutathione is well known for brightening skin tone.

cards.meaning_en: Squalane — lightweight, fast-absorbing moisturizing oil
cards.example_en: Squalane oil isn't sticky.

cards.meaning_en: Glycerin — the most basic, widely used humectant
cards.example_ko: 글리세린은 대부분의 보습 제품에 들어 있어요.
cards.example_en: Glycerin is in most moisturizing products.

decks.name: 제품 종류 2
decks.description: More product types & in-store shopping vocabulary

cards.meaning_en: "Skin" — the Korean word for toner
cards.example_en: Apply lotion after skin (toner).

cards.meaning_ko: 스킨 다음에 바르는 가벼운 보습 제품(에멀전)
cards.meaning_en: Lotion (emulsion) — light moisturizer applied after toner
cards.example_en: A light lotion is good for oily skin.

cards.meaning_en: Cleansing oil — oil that dissolves makeup and sebum
cards.example_en: I remove makeup first with cleansing oil.

cards.meaning_en: Cleansing water — water-light makeup remover
cards.example_en: Cleansing water is great for a light cleanse.

cards.meaning_en: Toner pad — pre-soaked pad for wiping and toning
cards.example_en: Toner pads are handy for tidying up dead skin.

cards.meaning_ko: 얼굴에 붙이거나 바르는 집중 케어 팩
cards.meaning_en: Mask pack — intensive-care face mask
cards.example_en: Can I buy mask packs individually?

cards.meaning_en: Nose strip — pack that removes blackheads from the nose
cards.example_en: I use nose strips to remove blackheads.

cards.meaning_en: Peeling gel — gel that rolls away dead skin when rubbed
cards.example_en: Use peeling gel only once a week.

cards.meaning_en: Lip balm — keeps lips moisturized and protected
cards.example_en: Do you have an unscented lip balm?

cards.meaning_en: Hand cream — moisturizer for the hands
cards.example_en: Hand cream makes a nice gift.

cards.meaning_ko: 좋은 향을 내기 위해 뿌리는 제품
cards.meaning_en: Perfume — fragrance applied for a pleasant scent
cards.example_en: Please recommend a light perfume.

cards.meaning_en: Nourishing cream — rich cream that nourishes the skin
cards.example_en: Nourishing cream is good for dry skin.

decks.name: 피부 고민
decks.description: Skin types, conditions & concerns for shopping

cards.meaning_ko: 부위마다 유분과 수분이 다른 피부 타입
cards.meaning_en: Combination skin — oily in some areas, dry in others
cards.example_en: I have combination skin. What would be good?

cards.meaning_en: Acne — pimples caused by sebum and inflammation
cards.example_en: Do you have something for acne-prone skin?

cards.meaning_ko: 모공이 막혀 검게 보이는 피지 덩어리
cards.meaning_en: Blackhead — dark, clogged sebum in a pore
cards.example_en: Please recommend something for blackheads.

cards.meaning_en: Dead skin — flaky dead cells on the skin surface
cards.example_en: My skin is flaking—what should I do?

cards.meaning_en: Redness — flushed, reddened skin
cards.example_en: Do you have something to calm redness?

cards.meaning_en: Pigmentation — uneven dark patches from melanin
cards.example_en: Brightening products are good for pigmentation.

cards.meaning_en: Blemishes — small spots and marks on the skin
cards.example_en: Do you have a cushion that covers blemishes?

cards.meaning_en: Wrinkle — fine lines and creases in the skin
cards.example_en: Do you have a cream for eye wrinkles?

cards.meaning_en: Elasticity — the skin's springy firmness
cards.example_en: Please recommend something for firmness.

cards.meaning_en: Soothing — calming irritated skin
cards.example_ko: 진정 효과 있는 제품 찾고 있어요.
cards.example_en: I'm looking for something with a soothing effect.

cards.meaning_ko: 피부에 수분을 공급해 촉촉하게 하는 것
cards.meaning_en: Hydration — supplying moisture to keep skin supple
cards.example_en: Please recommend a cream with good hydration.

cards.meaning_en: Irritation — when a product or environment aggravates skin
cards.example_en: Is this product non-irritating?
